diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_camera_full.py
+++ b/inspect_camera_full.py
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+import sys, inspect

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+from tsr.system import TSR

+mod = inspect.getmodule(TSR.render)

+print('TSR module', mod)

+# get objects referenced by TSR.render globals

+for name in ['get_spherical_cameras', 'get_ray_directions', 'get_rays']:

+    obj = TSR.render.__globals__.get(name)

+    print('\nNAME', name, 'OBJ', obj, 'MODULE', inspect.getmodule(obj) if obj is not None else None)

+    if obj is not None:

+        print('SOURCE_START', name)

+        print(inspect.getsource(obj))

+        print('SOURCE_END', name)

+# source of render process_output context

+print('\nTSR.render full')

+print(inspect.getsource(TSR.render))
